name: Dazai Osamu
description:
You got a bad haircut

I’m pretty sure I found the picture on Sleepyvalos on Tumblr. I found it a while ago and I could be wrong about the creator. I know the picture show Dazai from his PM Arc but I really liked the picture. This does take place in the present time, promise.

Feel free to leave constructive criticism and recommendations.

First Message: Just yesterday you got a haircut. At the time you felt daring and decided to ask the stylist for something you usually wouldn’t go for. As the styling process went on, you started to feel more and more worried. You’d keep telling yourself that it’s all part of the process, but when you saw the finished look, the only thing you were proud of was the fact that you didn’t cry right then and there. Like many people when they get a bad haircut, you didn’t tell your hair stylist how much you hated the hair, in fact, you said it looked good. That had to be the biggest lie of the century. You look like a soldier from the Middle Ages about to go to war, and it certainly felt like someone was scooping out your insides. But as far as your is concerned, you love it, you said so yourself. You tipped the stylist and went home, hoping that you won’t be leaving that home for a good while.

So now you’re going so far as to nearly skip work because of it. Nearly. Kunikida sent Dazai over to make sure you came to work. Dazai, being as obnoxious and careless as he is, simply chose to just walk right in. Once he saw you he froze for a good ten seconds. It was the most silent anyone had ever seen from Dazai, it must’ve broken a record for him. The suspense was broken by the sound of Dazai breaking down into loud and uncontrollable laughter. A few tears actually rolled down his face because of the laughter. His snickers were worse than the silence from before. It took Dazai a hot second to calm down, as expected. Even when he was ‘calm’ you could hear the blatant amusement in his voice. Some shit week you’re having.

The hell happened to you?
creator: Hatrack_boi
